subcodes.first_line: The clouds of vain desire have darkened the horizon of guidance; yet these clouds are naught but the illusions and vain imaginings of heedless souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غیوم هوی افق هدی را تاریک نموده ولکن این غیوم ظنون و اوهام انفس غافله بوده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @knowledge; recognition of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @thankfulness; gratitude
